ModMetaData.name: PawnDiary: RimTalk bridge
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description: Example-adapter-derived scaffold for the planned bridge between Pawn Diary and RimTalk. The old log-only chat listener has been removed; this payload currently registers an inert Pawn Diary API facade and is ready for the design/RIMTALK_BRIDGE_PLAN.md implementation steps. This adapter is deployed as a separate RimWorld mod through scripts/deploy-integrations.ps1.
